channel.title: Jordan Joe Cooper
channel.description: Writing about technology, engineering leadership, and turning intention into reality.

item.title: Programming & Jevons Paradox
item.description: Why cheaper code may lead to more programmers, not fewer

item.title: Avoiding Persian Messenger Syndrome
item.description: Many organisations have a news problem, good news is shared and bad news is buried, here's why and how to avoid it.

item.title: Work and artificial intelligence
item.description: The modern printing press with speed boost. AI is changing what human work is and means.

item.title: Quotes / Aphorisms
item.description: Collection of quotes and aphorisms from books, conversations, and podcasts. Wisdom from Charlie Munger, Warren Buffettt, Marcus Aurelius, and others.
